description: Format the climate science research paper in /home/ga/Documents/raw_paper.docx into a proper academic structure. The title must be centered, 16pt, and bold, while the authors line must be centered, 12pt, and italic. Apply 'Heading 1' style to the Abstract, Introduction, Methods, Results, Discussion, Conclusion, and References sections, and 'Heading 2' style to the Data Collection, Statistical Analysis, Temperature Trends, and Precipitation Patterns subsections. Set all body text paragraphs to justified alignment and apply a 0.5-inch hanging indent to all entries in the References section. Save the formatted document.

metadata.title_text: Regional Climate Variability and Extreme Weather Events
metadata.authors_text: Hansen, J., Sato, M., Ruedy, R., Lo, K., and Medina-Elizade, M.
